discrepancy_analysis:
A. REPORTED vs MODEL
   - Reported (paper, Supp Fig 3c): SUZ12 frequency = 20% in TCGA MPNST oncoprint
   - Model: DATA_UNAVAILABLE - TCGA cohort was not deposited locally; only the Toronto cohort data is available in the deposited data_dir

B. CONCORDANCE ASSESSMENT
   - Unable to evaluate concordance because the underlying TCGA MPNST data required to reproduce the oncoprint is not accessible
   - Per the ±10% concordance rule, this cannot be computed without a numeric model result

C. ROOT CAUSE INVESTIGATION
   - The question asks about the SUZ12 mutation/alteration frequency in the TCGA MPNST cohort as depicted in Supplementary Figure 3c
   - The local data directory only contains the Toronto cohort (the primary cohort used in the paper)
   - TCGA MPNST data would need to be retrieved from cBioPortal or the TCGA/GDC data portal
   - No local files were deposited to allow independent reproduction of the TCGA oncoprint

D. CLASSIFICATION
   - Root cause: 7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING - the external TCGA validation cohort data was referenced in the paper but not included in the deposited data package

E. PROPOSED FIX
   - Retrieve TCGA MPNST mutation data (e.g., from cBioPortal 'mpnst_mskcc_2019' or equivalent TCGA study) and re-compute SUZ12 alteration frequency across the TCGA MPNST cohort

F. CONFIDENCE
   - LOW - the discrepancy is structural (missing data) rather than methodological; no numeric comparison is possible
proposed_fix: Retrieve TCGA MPNST mutation/CNA data from cBioPortal or GDC and recompute SUZ12 alteration frequency to compare against the reported 20% from Supp Fig 3c
